name: create_form
description: Create a new Typeform form programmatically. You must provide a title and an array of fields (questions). Each field needs a type and title at minimum. Supported field types include: short_text, long_text, multiple_choice, yes_no, email, number, rating, opinion_scale, date, dropdown, file_upload, legal, website, phone_number, statement, picture_choice, ranking, and group. You can also configure settings like language, progress bar, and notification emails.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: The title of the form, displayed at the top and in listings.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Array of field objects. Each field must have 'title' (the question text) and 'type' (the field type). Optionally include 'ref' (unique reference), 'properties' (type-specific settings), and 'validations' (e.g., required).

parameters.name: settings
parameters.description: Form settings object. Can include 'language' (e.g., 'en'), 'is_public' (boolean), 'progress_bar' ('percentage' or 'proportion'), 'show_progress_bar' (boolean).

parameters.name: thankyou_screens
parameters.description: Array of thank-you screen objects shown after form submission. Each has 'title' and optional 'properties' with 'show_button', 'button_text', 'button_mode', and 'redirect_url'.

parameters.name: workspace
parameters.description: Workspace to create the form in. Object with 'href' pointing to the workspace URL.

fields.title: Which product are you providing feedback for?
How would you rate the product overall?
What features did you like the most?
